initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.laps = (SELECT MAX(laps) FROM results WHERE raceId = r.raceId) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_rate
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2008 
  AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.laps = (SELECT MAX(laps) FROM results r2 JOIN races ra ON r2.raceId = ra.raceId WHERE ra.year = 2008 AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_rate
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2008 AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN results.laps = (SELECT MAX(laps) FROM results r2 JOIN races r3 ON r2.raceId = r3.raceId WHERE r3.year = 2008 AND r3.name = 'Australian Grand Prix') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_rate
FROM results
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE races.year = 2008 AND races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN results.laps = (SELECT MAX(laps) FROM results r2 JOIN races r3 ON r2.raceId = r3.raceId WHERE r3.year = 2008 AND r3.name = 'Australian Grand Prix') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_rate
FROM results
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE races.year = 2008 AND races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.laps = (SELECT MAX(laps) FROM results WHERE raceId = r.raceId) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_rate
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2008 AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';
